title: bicornella schlechteri
intro: Bicornella schlechteri, also known as the 'two-horned' plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Bicornella schlechteri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application to harness its medicinal benefits.
